name: @ujjwalvivek/tinyts
description: A tiny TypeScript-first 2D web game engine
author: ujjwalvivek

scripts.build: npm run build:esm && npm run build:global && npm run build:min && npm run build:fonts && npm run docs
scripts.build:min: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=tinyts --minify --footer:js="for(var _k in tinyts)globalThis[_k]=tinyts[_k]" --outfile=dist/tinyts.min.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=dist/tinyts.esm.min.js
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:types && npm run size
scripts.check: npm exec tsc -- --noEmit && npm run build:all && npm test
scripts.docs: typedoc && mkdir -p docs/examples docs/dist && cp -r examples/. docs/examples/ && cp -r dist/. docs/dist/
